Your Photo Here

Hi, I'm Morgan!

Founder of Bark & Ride — a passionate dog lover and your trusted pet care professional in Charlotte County. Every tail wag makes my day!

My Journey

I grew up surrounded by animals — from our family's golden retrievers to the neighbor dogs I'd walk every afternoon after school. When I moved to Charlotte County five years ago, I turned that lifelong love into a career. What started as helping friends and neighbors quickly grew into a full-time passion.

My Philosophy

Every dog has their own personality, quirks, and comfort zone. I take the time to learn what makes your pup tick — whether they're an anxious rescue who needs extra patience or a high-energy pup who wants to chase every squirrel. There's no one-size-fits-all here.

Why Choose Me

With over 500 stays and walks completed, I've earned the trust of pet parents across Southwest Florida. I send photo and video updates on every visit, respond to messages within minutes, and treat every dog like my own. Your peace of mind is just as important as your pup's happiness.

Beyond the Walks

When I'm not out on walks, you'll find me at the beach with my own two pups, Luna and Biscuit — a three-year-old lab mix and a very opinionated dachshund. I also volunteer at the Charlotte County Humane Society on weekends, because there's really no such thing as too much dog time.

Bark & Ride Rates & Services

Transparent pricing for quality care. All services include photo updates and detailed visit reports.

Dog Walking

30-Minute Walk

Perfect for a quick energy release and potty break

$20

60-Minute Walk

Extended adventure for active pups who love to explore

$30

Group Walk (30 min)

Social walk with other friendly dogs (max 3)

$15
In-Home Sitting

In-Home Sitting (per day)

Full day care in your home while you're away

$55

Overnight Sitting

I stay overnight to keep your pup company

$65

Extended Stay

Multi-day care for vacations (per night)

$60
Drop-In Visits

Quick Check-In (15 min)

Potty break, fresh water, quick cuddles

$12

Standard Drop-In (30 min)

Feed, walk, play, and plenty of love

$20

Extended Drop-In (60 min)

Longer visit with walk and extended playtime

$30
Holiday Rate Modifiers +$10–15 on major holidays

The following holidays have additional charges added to base rates due to high demand:

New Year's Eve/Day+$10
Memorial Day Weekend+$10
July 4th+$15
Labor Day Weekend+$10
Thanksgiving Week+$15
Christmas Week+$15
Good to Know

Prices may vary based on location within Charlotte County, number of pets, and special requirements. Contact me for a personalised quote!
